testcase.name: API Integration Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-API-001: should fetch well list successfully
testcase.system-out: API Integration tests setup Starting: Fetch well list test ✓ Received 91 wells from API ✓ Well data structure valid ✓ Test passed: Well list fetched

testcase.name: API Integration Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-API-002: should fetch individual well details
testcase.system-out: Starting: Fetch well details test ✓ Test passed: Well details fetched

testcase.name: API Integration Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-API-003: should fetch real-time data without errors
testcase.system-out: Starting: Real-time data fetch test ✓ Test passed: Real-time data handling

testcase.name: API Integration Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-API-004: should fetch archive data for specified date range
testcase.system-out: Starting: Archive data fetch test ✓ Test passed: Archive data fetch

testcase.name: API Integration Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-API-005: should handle API errors gracefully
testcase.system-out: Starting: API error handling test ✓ Test passed: Error handling validated

testcase.name: Authentication Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-Auth-001: should login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Starting: Valid login test ✓ Test passed: Valid login successful

testcase.name: Authentication Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-Auth-002: should reject invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: Starting: Invalid credentials test ✓ Test passed: Invalid credentials properly rejected

testcase.name: Authentication Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-Auth-003: should maintain session on page refresh
testcase.system-out: Starting: Session persistence test Logout button not found, continuing test ✓ Test passed: Session persisted after refresh

testcase.name: Authentication Tests (Priority 1 - Critical) › TS-Auth-004: should logout and clear session
testcase.system-out: Starting: Logout test Logout button not found via text selector, trying alternative ✓ Test passed: Logout completed

testcase.name: Chart & Data Visualization Tests (Priority 2 - High) › TS-Chart-001: should render charts with loaded data
testcase.system-out: Starting: Chart rendering test ⚠ Chart container may not be visible, checking for loading state ⚠ No chart elements found - chart may not have rendered ✓ Test passed: Chart rendering validated

testcase.name: Chart & Data Visualization Tests (Priority 2 - High) › TS-Chart-002: should display accurate data in charts
testcase.system-out: Starting: Chart data accuracy test Found 0 data values in chart ✓ Test passed: Data accuracy check completed

testcase.name: Chart & Data Visualization Tests (Priority 2 - High) › TS-Chart-003: should switch between chart modes correctly
testcase.system-out: Starting: Chart mode switching test Found 1 potential toggle elements ✓ Test passed: Chart mode switching validated

testcase.name: Chart & Data Visualization Tests (Priority 2 - High) › TS-Chart-004: should load archive data for selected date ranges
testcase.system-out: Starting: Date range selection test Found 0 date picker elements ⚠ No date picker found on page ✓ Test passed: Date range selection validated
